MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jacqueline Worthington, Judgment Debtor, in pro per
Tentative ruling adopted. Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. Earnings held by the levying officer are ordered released to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
